name: THORACIC SPLENOSIS
definition: autotransplantation of splenic tissue to pleural space following thoracoabdominal trauma;

demographics.Frequency: 18% with injury of spleen and diaphragm by blunt trauma; more common in

dominant_finding: one or several nodules in left pleura / fissures measuring several mm to 6 cm
discriminating_features: one or several nodules in left pleura / fissures measuring several mm to 6 cm
splenectomy / splenules in left upper quadrant
positive 99mTc-labeled heat-damaged RBCs (most sensitive), 99mTc-sulfur colloid scan /
